title: tagetes palmeri
intro: Tagetes palmeri, also known as Palmer's marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tagetes palmeri include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Tagetes palmeri can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
